boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Benefits / public casework controls action now? Action: emergency benefit release with identity and hardship verified. Boundary: case note cannot release benefit unless identity and exception scope close.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Anomaly tone and note text do not override source control.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Identity proof, hardship code, and cap match confirmed.

critical_features_preserved: identity proof, hardship code, and emergency amount cap match
final_answer: Source records close the exact requested boundary: the control record confirms identity proof, hardship code, and emergency amount cap match for this action. Policy says execution may proceed only when current source records close the boundary, and they do. The communication boundary note is non-controlling. Action may proceed.
